channel.title: Youtube on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Youtube on Arrans github.io

item.title: iv-org/invidious
item.description: Invidious is an alternative front-end to YouTube

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source Spotify client that doesn’t require Premium nor uses Electron! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: Shabinder/SpotiFlyer
item.description: Kotlin Multiplatform Music Downloader, Supports Spotify / Gaana / Youtube Music / Jio Saavn / SoundCloud.

item.title: prateekmedia/pstube
item.description: Watch and download videos without ads

item.title: diraven/youtube-auto-watch-later
item.description: Automatically adds videos from your YouTube subscriptions to the watch later playlist.
